name: Apicbase Food Management API
what_it_does: Apicbase Food Management REST API for recipe management, menu engineering, procurement, and food cost analytics in hospitality and food service. Enables AI agents to manage recipe database and versioning for culinary content management, handle nutritional and allergen analysis for menu compliance automation, access food cost calculation and margin optimization for profitability management, retrieve procurement and inventory management for ingredient sourcing automation, manage menu planning and engineering for menu development workflow, handle multi-language and multi-currency support for international restaurant groups, access supplier catalog integration for direct purchase order management, retrieve HACCP and food safety compliance tracking for regulatory automation, manage digital menu and POS integration for menu publishing, and integrate Apicbase with ERP, POS, and procurement platforms for unified food management.
use_cases: Managing recipes and costs from culinary operations agents
Checking allergen compliance from menu compliance agents
Optimizing menu margins from menu engineering agents
not_for: Non-hospitality food businesses without recipe management needs
Simple single-restaurant operations without multi-unit complexity
Quick service concepts without menu engineering requirements
best_when: A restaurant group, hotel F&B operation, or contract catering company wants AI agents to automate recipe management, nutritional compliance, food cost tracking, menu engineering, and procurement across multiple locations.
avoid_when: EU ALLERGEN REGULATION: Automated allergen information must comply with EU Food Information Regulation (FIR) No 1169/2011 requiring accurate disclosure of 14 major allergens; automated menu publication with incorrect allergen data creates EU regulatory violation and food allergy liability. HACCP documentation automation — automated HACCP critical control point logging must be validated against food safety plans; automated HACCP records that are inaccurate or incomplete create food safety regulatory risk. Multi-language allergen accuracy — Apicbase supports multi-language menus for international operations; allergen translation accuracy must be verified by native speakers; automated translation of allergen terms creates cross-language allergen disclosure risk.

auth.notes: Apicbase uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Documentation at docs.apicbase.com. Ghent, Belgium HQ. Founded 2013. Private (Peak Capital, PMV). 250+ hospitality and food service customers across 50+ countries. EU-focused food management with FIR allergen compliance. Competes with Galley Solutions, MarketMan, and Fourth for hospitality food management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; recipe and procurement modules
pricing.notes: Ghent, Belgium. Founded 2013. Peak Capital/PMV-backed. 250+ hospitality customers. EU allergen compliance focus. Competes with Galley and Fourth for food management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: EU FIR ALLERGEN COMPLIANCE: Automated allergen disclosure must comply with EU Food Information Regulation No 1169/2011 requiring accurate disclosure of 14 major allergens on menus and labels; automated menu publication with incorrect allergen data creates EU food safety regulatory violation

HACCP documentation accuracy — automated HACCP critical control point records must be accurate and complete; incomplete or inaccurate automated HACCP logs create food safety authority compliance risk during inspections

Multi-language allergen translation — Apicbase supports 20+ languages; automated allergen term translation must be verified by qualified translators; incorrect allergen terminology in translated menus creates allergy disclosure liability
GDPR for EU customers — Belgian HQ means GDPR applies to all EU customer and employee data; automated data processing requires lawful basis and data processing agreements
Webhook reliability — verify webhook delivery and retry behavior for recipe update and procurement events before building event-driven automation

Supplier catalog integration — automated procurement from supplier catalogs requires up-to-date product and pricing data; stale supplier catalog data creates purchase order errors and price discrepancies
agent_readiness.security_notes: Food management. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. EU/US. Recipe, allergen, and procurement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Food management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Recipe and allergen data.
